## createWikilinkHref() function

Builds a wikilink destination without decoding existing percent escapes.

`http`<!-- -->, `https`<!-- -->, `mailto`<!-- -->, and `tel` destinations pass through unchanged. Other schemes are rejected with a harmless fragment destination.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createWikilinkHref(target: string, options?: CreateWikilinkHrefOptions): string;
```
